---
title: "Database Loading and Validation Checks"
author: "Muhammad Suffyan Khan"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Code Part for DB load and some validation checks before actual analysis.

```{r}
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
library(dplyr)

# 1. Connect to PostgreSQL
con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  dbname = "project3_datascience_skills", #change if needed
  host = "localhost",
  port = 5432,
  user = "postgres",
  password = readline(prompt = "Enter DB password: ")
)

# 2. Set schema
dbExecute(con, "SET search_path TO project3;")

# 3. Load tables and view
jobs <- dbReadTable(con, Id(schema = "project3", table = "jobs"))
skills <- dbReadTable(con, Id(schema = "project3", table = "skills"))
job_skills <- dbReadTable(con, Id(schema = "project3", table = "job_skills"))
job_skill_details <- dbReadTable(con, Id(schema = "project3", table = "vw_job_skill_details"))

# 4. Basic structure checks
cat("Rows/Cols:\n")
cat("jobs:", nrow(jobs), "rows,", ncol(jobs), "cols\n")
cat("skills:", nrow(skills), "rows,", ncol(skills), "cols\n")
cat("job_skills:", nrow(job_skills), "rows,", ncol(job_skills), "cols\n")
cat("vw_job_skill_details:", nrow(job_skill_details), "rows,", ncol(job_skill_details), "cols\n\n")

# 5. Preview data
cat("Preview: jobs\n")
print(head(jobs, 5))

cat("\nPreview: skills\n")
print(head(skills, 5))

cat("\nPreview: job_skills\n")
print(head(job_skills, 5))

cat("\nPreview: vw_job_skill_details\n")
print(head(job_skill_details, 5))

# 6. Key checks
cat("\nValidation checks:\n")

cat("Duplicate job_id in jobs:",
    sum(duplicated(jobs$job_id)), "\n")

cat("Duplicate skill_id in skills:",
    sum(duplicated(skills$skill_id)), "\n")

cat("Duplicate (job_id, skill_id) pairs in job_skills:",
    sum(duplicated(job_skills[, c("job_id", "skill_id")])), "\n")

cat("Missing job_id in jobs:",
    sum(is.na(jobs$job_id)), "\n")

cat("Missing skill_id in skills:",
    sum(is.na(skills$skill_id)), "\n")

cat("Missing IDs in job_skills:",
    sum(is.na(job_skills$job_id)) + sum(is.na(job_skills$skill_id)), "\n")

# 7. Referential integrity checks
missing_job_ids <- anti_join(job_skills, jobs, by = "job_id")
missing_skill_ids <- anti_join(job_skills, skills, by = "skill_id")

cat("Unmatched job_id values in job_skills:", nrow(missing_job_ids), "\n")
cat("Unmatched skill_id values in job_skills:", nrow(missing_skill_ids), "\n")

# 8. Jobs without matched skills
jobs_without_skills <- jobs %>%
  anti_join(job_skills, by = "job_id")

cat("Jobs without matched skills:", nrow(jobs_without_skills), "\n")

# 9. Quick summary counts
cat("\nSummary counts:\n")
cat("Unique jobs in job_skills:", n_distinct(job_skills$job_id), "\n")
cat("Unique skills in job_skills:", n_distinct(job_skills$skill_id), "\n")

# 10. Top skills check
top_skills_check <- job_skill_details %>%
  count(skill_name, sort = TRUE)

cat("\nTop skills preview:\n")
print(head(top_skills_check, 10))

# 11. Disconnect (after all analysis and everything)
dbDisconnect(con)
```
